TITLES.LANDING: Khana - Never Lose a Booking Again

DESCRIPTIONS.LANDING: The operating system for local booking-based businesses. Real-time calendar, zero double-bookings, and instant confirmations.
DESCRIPTIONS.AUTH: Secure access to your Khana workspace.
DESCRIPTIONS.ONBOARDING: Set up your business and first facility to start taking bookings.
DESCRIPTIONS.DASHBOARD: Manage bookings, facilities, team, and operations in Khana dashboard.
DESCRIPTIONS.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to access this page.

HERO.BADGE: The Operating System for Booking-Based Businesses

SUBHEADLINE.LINE_1: Real-time calendar. Zero double-bookings. Happy customers.
SUBHEADLINE.LINE_2: The modern way to manage your sports facility or rental property.

HERO.CTA_START_ARIA: Start your free trial - no credit card required

PROBLEM_SOLUTION.SUBTITLE: See how facility managers across MENA are transforming their booking operations

ITEMS.ENDLESS_MESSAGES: Endless WhatsApp messages to check availability
ITEMS.PHONE_TAG: Phone tag just to confirm a slot
ITEMS.NO_VISIBILITY: No visibility into revenue or patterns

ITEMS.DIGITAL_CALENDAR: Digital calendar synced across all devices

FEATURES_GRID.SUBTITLE: From real-time availability to smart analytics, Khana gives you the tools to eliminate chaos and delight your customers.

REALTIME_CALENDAR.TITLE: Real-Time Calendar
REALTIME_CALENDAR.DESCRIPTION: No more "let me check and get back to you." Your calendar updates instantly across all devices, showing live availability.

CONFLICT_DETECTION.TITLE: Zero Double-Bookings
CONFLICT_DETECTION.DESCRIPTION: Our smart system automatically detects and prevents overlapping bookings before they happen. Never disappoint a customer again.

MOBILE_FIRST.TITLE: Mobile-First Design
MOBILE_FIRST.DESCRIPTION: Check-in customers, view bookings, update availability-all from your mobile device. Manage your business from anywhere.

CUSTOMER_HISTORY.TITLE: Know Your Customers
CUSTOMER_HISTORY.DESCRIPTION: Track booking history, preferences, and payment status. Build lasting relationships, not just one-time transactions.

SMART_PRICING.TITLE: Dynamic Pricing
SMART_PRICING.DESCRIPTION: Set peak and off-peak rates, create promo codes, and maximize revenue during high-demand periods automatically.

SECURITY.TITLE: Bank-Level Security
SECURITY.DESCRIPTION: GDPR-compliant data handling, role-based permissions, and complete audit trails. Your data is safe with us.

HOW_IT_WORKS.SUBTITLE: No complex setup. No lengthy onboarding. Start managing bookings professionally in just four simple steps.

SIGNUP.TITLE: Sign Up in 2 Minutes
SIGNUP.DESCRIPTION: Create your account and add your facilities, courts, or properties. No technical knowledge required.

IMPORT.TITLE: Import Existing Bookings
IMPORT.DESCRIPTION: Easily migrate your existing bookings from WhatsApp, paper, or spreadsheets. We'll help you get started.

SHARE.TITLE: Share Booking Link
SHARE.DESCRIPTION: Get a unique booking URL that customers can use to book directly. Share it on WhatsApp, social media, or your website.

MANAGE.TITLE: Manage Everything
MANAGE.DESCRIPTION: Track bookings, revenue, and customer data in one beautiful dashboard. You're now in control.

HOW_IT_WORKS.CTA_TEXT: Ready to transform your booking process?

SOCIAL_PROOF.SUBTITLE: Don't just take our word for it. See what our customers have to say about transforming their booking operations.

1.QUOTE: Khana reduced our booking errors by 95%. Our customers love the instant confirmations, and we've seen a 30% increase in repeat bookings.
1.AUTHOR: Ahmed Al-Rashid

2.QUOTE: Before Khana, we spent 3 hours daily managing WhatsApp bookings. Now it's completely automated. I wish we had found this sooner!
2.AUTHOR: Sara Al-Mahmoud

3.QUOTE: The real-time calendar is a game-changer. Our staff can focus on customer service instead of juggling phone calls and messages.
3.AUTHOR: Mohammed Khalil

4.QUOTE: Finally, a system that understands our market. The Arabic support and RTL interface made adoption seamless for our entire team.
4.AUTHOR: Fatima Al-Hassan

5.QUOTE: Revenue tracking was impossible before. Now I can see exactly which courts are most profitable and optimize pricing accordingly.
5.AUTHOR: Khalid Ibrahim

BOTTOM_CTA.SUBHEADLINE: Join 100+ facilities across MENA who have transformed their booking operations. Start your free trial today and see the difference in minutes.

FOOTER.TAGLINE: The Operating System for Local Booking-Based Businesses. Eliminate chaos. Delight customers.
